_comment: Reusable flight watches for the daily flight-prices alert. Add new objects to 'watches' to track more routes/variations — they all roll into one daily #alerts post. Primary data source is the Google Flights scrape (services/flight_scrape.cjs); SerpApi is the automatic fallback. 'select' criteria are applied after scraping to pick the single best flight per watch.

watches.label: Best value 1-stop — Thu eve, short layover
Best direct — Thu night out / Sun morning back
